functions.name: robot_command
functions.description: Send a natural language command to a robot for execution using the NWO Robotics API. Maps to POST /api-robotics.php?action=execute

functions.name: swarm_deploy
functions.description: Deploy multiple robots as a coordinated swarm. Maps to POST /api-robotics.php?action=swarm

functions.name: sensor_activate
functions.description: Activate robot sensors. Maps to POST /api-robotics.php?action=sensor_fusion

functions.name: slam_start
functions.description: Start SLAM for navigation/mapping. Maps to POST /api-robotics-slam.php

functions.name: navigation_goto
functions.description: Navigate to coordinates. Maps to POST /api-robotics.php?action=navigate

functions.name: emergency_stop
functions.description: Emergency stop robot(s). Maps to POST /api-robotics.php?action=emergency or ROS2 bridge

functions.name: status_check
functions.description: Check robot status. Maps to GET /api-robotics.php?action=query_state

functions.name: manipulator_control
functions.description: Control robot manipulator. Maps to POST /api-robotics.php?action=manipulate

functions.name: inference
functions.description: Run model inference. Maps to POST /api-robotics.php?action=inference or Edge API

functions.name: list_models
functions.description: List available models. Maps to GET /api-robotics.php?action=list_models

functions.name: get_model_info
functions.description: Get model details. Maps to GET /api-robotics.php?action=get_model_info

functions.name: task_planner
functions.description: Break down complex tasks. Maps to POST /api-robotics.php?action=task_planner

functions.name: execute_subtask
functions.description: Execute subtask from plan. Maps to POST /api-robotics.php?action=execute_subtask

functions.name: learning_recommend
functions.description: Get learning recommendations. Maps to POST /api-robotics.php?action=learning&subaction=recommend

functions.name: learning_log
functions.description: Log execution for learning. Maps to POST /api-robotics.php?action=learning&subaction=log

functions.name: register_agent
functions.description: Register new agent. Maps to POST /api-agent-register.php

functions.name: update_agent
functions.description: Update agent. Maps to PUT /api-robotics.php?action=update_agent

functions.name: get_agent
functions.description: Get agent info. Maps to GET /api-robotics.php?action=get_agent

functions.name: agent_discovery_health
functions.description: Health check. Maps to GET /api-agent-discovery.php?action=health

functions.name: agent_discovery_whoami
functions.description: Get agent identity. Maps to GET /api-agent-discovery.php?action=whoami

functions.name: agent_discovery_capabilities
functions.description: Discover capabilities. Maps to GET /api-agent-discovery.php?action=capabilities

functions.name: agent_discovery_dry_run
functions.description: Validate task. Maps to POST /api-agent-discovery.php?action=dry-run

functions.name: agent_discovery_plan
functions.description: Generate plan. Maps to POST /api-agent-discovery.php?action=plan

functions.name: ros2_submit_action
functions.description: Submit ROS2 action. Maps to POST https://nwo-ros2-bridge.onrender.com/api/v1/action

functions.name: ros2_list_robots
functions.description: List ROS2 robots. Maps to GET https://nwo-ros2-bridge.onrender.com/api/v1/robots

functions.name: ros2_get_robot_status
functions.description: Get ROS2 robot status. Maps to GET https://nwo-ros2-bridge.onrender.com/api/v1/robots/{id}/status

functions.name: ros2_send_command
functions.description: Send ROS2 command. Maps to POST https://nwo-ros2-bridge.onrender.com/api/v1/robots/{id}/command

functions.name: ros2_emergency_stop
functions.description: ROS2 emergency stop. Maps to POST https://nwo-ros2-bridge.onrender.com/api/v1/robots/{id}/emergency_stop

functions.name: simulate_trajectory
functions.description: Simulate trajectory. Maps to POST /api-simulation.php?action=simulate_trajectory

functions.name: check_collision
functions.description: Check collision. Maps to POST /api-simulation.php?action=check_collision

functions.name: get_tactile
functions.description: Get tactile sensor data. Maps to POST /api-orca.php?action=get_tactile

functions.name: slip_detection
functions.description: Detect object slip. Maps to POST /api-tactile.php?action=slip_detection

functions.name: start_online_rl
functions.description: Start online RL session. Maps to POST /api-online-rl.php?action=start_online_rl

functions.name: submit_telemetry
functions.description: Submit telemetry. Maps to POST /api-online-rl.php?action=submit_telemetry

functions.name: create_dataset
functions.description: Create training dataset. Maps to POST /api-fine-tune.php?action=create_dataset

functions.name: start_fine_tuning
functions.description: Start fine-tuning job. Maps to POST /api-fine-tune.php?action=start_job

functions.name: list_embodiments
functions.description: List robot embodiments. Maps to GET /api-embodiment.php?action=list

functions.name: get_embodiment_detail
functions.description: Get embodiment details. Maps to GET /api-embodiment.php?action=detail

functions.name: get_urdf
functions.description: Get URDF. Maps to GET /api-embodiment.php?action=urdf

functions.name: calibrate_confidence
functions.description: Calibrate confidence scores. Maps to POST /api-calibration.php?action=calibrate

functions.name: check_agent_balance
functions.description: Check agent quota. Maps to GET /api-agent-balance.php

functions.name: agent_pay
functions.description: Pay for tier upgrade. Maps to POST /api-agent-pay.php

functions.name: streaming_config
functions.description: Get streaming config. Maps to GET /api-robotics.php?action=streaming_config

functions.name: inference_stream
functions.description: Stream inference via SSE. Maps to GET /api-robotics.php?action=inference_stream&format=sse
